description: Build and maintain cloud-native backend services using AWS (Lambda, API Gateway) with Python and JavaScript, focusing on scalable microservice-based systems
Design and integrate APIs that connect modern cloud platforms with legacy enterprise systems and external services
Work on infrastructure automation using Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation) to make deployments more repeatable and reliable
Support CI/CD pipelines with tools like GitHub Actions and AWS CodePipeline to streamline delivery and reduce manual deployment steps
Improve system reliability through monitoring, logging, and observability dashboards used for operational visibility and incident response
Contribute to authentication and identity flows (SSO/Auth0), helping improve how users and systems securely access applications
Collaborate with engineers and stakeholders across teams to deliver cloud solutions and support production systems in day-to-day operations
Translate business processes into technical workflows and structured documentation for automation and system design
Design workflow automations using BPMN 2.0 and implement them with tools like n8n
Build backend services in Java and Python to support process automation and system integration
Contribute to microservice and event-driven architecture design within existing enterprise systems
Writing technical documentation covering workflows, systems, and deployment processes to support engineering teams
Work with cross-functional teams to improve automation, maintainability, and integration across internal systems
